name: water-filter-service
description: Water Filter Service Management System - Full Stack Application

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:customer && npm run build:agent && npm run build:admin
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../customer-app && npm install && cd ../agent-app && npm install && cd ../admin-panel && npm install
